title: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation
description: Make actor assignment judgeable instead of decorative. Runtime must compare task needs against skills, capabilities, role fit, and expected output contract, then record why the actor is selected, degraded, blocked, or escalated.
triage_notes: Completed TASK-051: actor-assignment-evaluation-record now evaluates actor skill packets into selected/degraded/blocked states, summarizes capability-fit evidence, exposes missing evidence and HRI projection state, validates fixture AAE-TASK-051-SELECTED, and runtime proof was written to /tmp/aof-task051-assignment-evaluation.json.
